articles.summary: 提出SpectraReward，利用预训练MLLM作为零样本奖励模型，无需额外训练即可用于文本到图像生成的强化学习，通过测量生成图像与文本描述的匹配程度提供奖励信号。

articles.title: Search Beyond What Can Be Taught: Evolving the Knowledge Boundary in Agentic Visual Generation
articles.excerpt: Visual generators excel at rendering, but they confidently fabricate what they do not know. articles.summary: 解决视觉生成器对未知内容（新角色、趋势等）的“自信幻觉”问题，通过智能体式搜索扩展世界知识边界，使生成器能动态获取和利用未见过信息，超越固定训练数据约束。

articles.title: Trust Region Policy Distillation
articles.excerpt: Big goals are hard to achieve all at once; breaking them into small steps is wiser. articles.summary: 提出信任区域策略蒸馏（TOP-D），通过动态构建近端教师将高方差、不稳定的在线策略蒸馏转化为稳定训练范式，实现渐进式知识迁移，提升蒸馏效率。

articles.title: KronQ: LLM Quantization via Kronecker-Factored Hessian

articles.summary: 提出KronQ量化方法，利用Kronecker因子近似Hessian矩阵，考虑输出通道非均等重要性，改进LLM后训练量化精度，在保持压缩率的同时减少量化损失。

articles.title: AdvancedMathBench: A Benchmark Suite for Advanced Mathematical Proof Generation and Verification
articles.excerpt: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on high-school and olympiad-style mathematics, yet their capabilities on advanced mathematics remain poorly understood. Existing benchmarks, however, fall short in both scope and evaluation granularity: they provide limited disciplina
articles.summary: 提出AdvancedMathBench基准套件，用于评估LLM在高等数学证明生成与验证方面的能力，涵盖多个学科领域，提供细粒度评估，填补现有高级数学基准的空白。

articles.title: Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities

articles.summary: 综述LLM中的元认知基础、进展与机遇，讨论元认知在学习、问题解决和决策中的关键作用，分析当前LLM元认知能力现状，展望未来方向以实现更透明、自主的AI系统。

articles.title: Towards Mechanistically Understanding Why Memorized Knowledge Fails to Generalize in Large Language Model Finetuning
articles.excerpt: Fine-tuning LLMs to inject new knowledge faces a critical challenge: LLMs can quickly memorize new facts, yet fail to use them for downstream reasoning tasks. articles.summary: 揭示LLM微调中“知道-使用差距”现象：模型能记忆新事实但无法泛化用于推理。通过机制分析探究其原因，提出弥合记忆与泛化之间鸿沟的方向。

articles.title: Function-Aware Fill-in-the-Middle as Mid-Training for Coding Agent Foundation Models

articles.summary: 提出函数感知的Fill-in-the-Middle作为编程智能体基础模型的中间训练方法，利用动作-观察-持续循环与函数调用的结构同构性，提升智能体整合工具返回和持续推理的能力。

articles.title: Proxy Exploration and Reusable Guidance: A Modular LLM Post-Training Paradigm via Proxy-Guided Update Signals

articles.title: Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs

articles.title: Remember When It Matters: Proactive Memory Agent for Long-Horizon Agents
articles.excerpt: In long-horizon tasks, decision-relevant state is often scattered across an expanding trajectory, while the action agent must surface it and act. articles.summary: 提出主动记忆智能体，在长程任务中动态记住并检索决策相关的轨迹状态（任务要求、环境事实、先前尝试等），防止关键信息被长上下文埋没，提升长程任务执行成功率。

articles.title: Multi-Agent LLMs Fail to Explore Each Other

articles.summary: 揭示当前LLM多智能体系统在相互探索方面的失败：智能体表现出短视和极化交互模式，无法有效探索彼此，提出需要新的机制促进多智能体间的探索性行为。
